residuals.risk: A superior outage could be mistaken for loss of local authority.
residuals.disposition: Every hierarchy level retains local log, trust, policy and distress operation.
residuals.stop_condition: Any local operation requires a superior or hub.

residuals.risk: A coordination hub could accumulate cell secrets or operational authority.
residuals.disposition: Hubs are optional, redundant and structurally denied cell keys, decryption, acceptance, TX and overwrite.
residuals.stop_condition: A hub can exercise any denied capability.

residuals.risk: Federation could export raw or excessive local evidence.
residuals.disposition: Peer agreements are outbound-only, minimal-disclosure and reject raw payloads.
residuals.stop_condition: A conforming agreement permits raw payload export.

residuals.risk: Unauthenticated distress could be discarded or promoted as authenticated.
residuals.disposition: Preserve it as quarantined unverified distress without authority escalation.
residuals.stop_condition: Unverified distress is lost or becomes operator-accepted.

residuals.risk: Disconnected logs could reconcile by silent overwrite or last-write-wins.
residuals.disposition: Append-only deterministic reconciliation exposes conflicts for human resolution.
residuals.stop_condition: A replay loses, overwrites or silently resolves a conflicting event.

residuals.risk: A single incident-wide LoRa mesh would saturate at mass scale.
residuals.disposition: Use isolated local networks per ResponseCell and separate federation backhaul.
residuals.stop_condition: A required profile depends on one incident-wide LoRa mesh.

residuals.risk: Concrete implementations still need enrollment, rotation, revocation and lost-device procedures.
residuals.disposition: Publish implementer SOP references with OS-07 reuse guides.
residuals.stop_condition: A reference build claims operational readiness without key lifecycle SOPs.

residuals.risk: Inter-organization semantic mappings may differ despite valid envelopes.
residuals.disposition: Add namespace mapping and conformance vectors in OS-08.
residuals.stop_condition: Conformance publication omits cross-namespace conflict vectors.

residuals.risk: The 50k simulation may be read as capacity or latency evidence.
residuals.disposition: Scope receipts to deterministic correctness; require a separate representative benchmark for performance claims.
residuals.stop_condition: A capacity, latency or throughput claim cites only the synthetic 50k fixture.

residuals.risk: Co-site RF coexistence among many teams is not physically characterized.
residuals.disposition: Require exact-configuration spectrum, near-far, antenna and airtime evidence for physical claims.
residuals.stop_condition: A field-readiness claim lacks exact co-site RF evidence.

residuals.risk: Carry-bundle custody and delayed revocation may fail under real incident logistics.
residuals.disposition: OS-07 must publish custody, handoff, expiry and compromised-carrier procedures.
residuals.stop_condition: A carry reference build omits chain-of-custody and expiry behavior.

residuals.risk: Future profiles could reintroduce central availability as a hidden dependency.
residuals.disposition: Mutation tests and the normative open boundary fail the gate on central critical paths.
residuals.stop_condition: Central or cloud availability enters a local critical path.
